title: Dhammapada, Chapter 20: The Way
description: Chapter 20 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 20 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: The best of paths is the Eightfold Path. The best of truths are the Four Noble Truths. The best of states is the passionless state. The best of men is the one who sees.
